groups.label: Neoneurogenesis metastatic cancer neuro-immune axis
groups.short_description: Review-gated draft group for tumor innervation, perineural migration, and nerve-associated immune evasion in metastatic cancer.
groups.long_definition: Genes and receptor pathways induced or co-opted in metastatic cancers that support tumor innervation, perineural migration, neural niche formation, and nerve-associated immune evasion. This is a review-gated neoneurogenesis draft, not a curated ontology import.
